title: Tire Size Calculator - Compare Tire Dimensions
description: Free tire size calculator. Calculate tire diameter, sidewall height, circumference, and compare two tire sizes for speedometer difference.
keywords: tire size calculator, tire comparison, tire diameter, tire circumference, speedometer error
intro: Calculate tire dimensions from size notation (e.g., 225/45R17). Compare two sizes to see diameter difference and speedometer error.

faq.a: Format: Width/AspectRatio R RimDiameter. Example: 225/45R17 means 225mm wide, sidewall is 45% of width, fits 17-inch rim.

faq.q: How much tire size difference is acceptable?
faq.a: Generally stay within 3% of original diameter. Larger differences affect speedometer accuracy, ABS, and may cause rubbing.
